zh.lifeSummary: 當James Killam於1677年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德時，他的父親Lot Kilham37歲，母親Hannah Goodale32歲。他和Patience Mary Collins至少有1個兒子和10個女兒。他去世於1761年3月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德享年84歲。

nameMeanings.name: Killam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire): variant of Kilham, a habitational name from any of the places in Northumberland and Yorkshire, so named either from Old English cylnum ‘(at) the kilns’, dative plural of cyln, or from Old English cyln ‘kiln’ or the personal name Cylla + Old Norse holmr ‘small island, water meadow’. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Killam was born in 1677, in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Lot Kilham, was 37 and his mother, Hannah Goodale, was 32. He had at least 1 son and 10 daughters with Patience Mary Collins. He died on 7 March 1761, in Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Killam est né en 1677, à Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Lot Kilham, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Hannah Goodale, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 10 filles avec Patience Mary Collins. Il est décédé le 7 mars 1761, à Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 84 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Killam è nato il nel 1677 nel Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Lot Kilham, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Hannah Goodale, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 10 figlie con Patience Mary Collins. Morì il 7 marzo 1761, nel Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: James Killamが1677年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードで生まれた時，父Lot Kilhamは37歳，母Hannah Goodaleは32歳であった。彼はPatience Mary Collinsとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と10人の娘をもうけた。彼は1761年3月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードエンフィールドで84歳で死去した。

ko.Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘

ko.lifeSummary: James Killam(이)가 1677년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lot Kilham(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Hannah Goodale(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Patience Mary Collins(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1761년 3월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 필드에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Killam nasceu em 1677, em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Lot Kilham, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Goodale, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 10 filhas com Patience Mary Collins. Ele faleceu em 7 de março de 1761, em Enfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Killam родился в 1677 г. в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Lot Kilham было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Hannah Goodale, 32. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 10 дочерей от Patience Mary Collins. Он умер 7 марта 1761 г. в местности энфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Killam nació en 1677, en Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Lot Kilham, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Hannah Goodale, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 10 hijas con Patience Mary Collins. Murió el 7 de marzo de 1761, en Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 84 años.
